","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4RmWPwu6i7ON0B0azxwphVI5GLdr7OvRVZkW/kv8fNx","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f847ea0031f8459d86262e4503d115b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708539&x-signature=cC8NcUQ7gxp1b%2BrhFtMVOtnBCzs%3D","user_id":"3601597448848995","user_name":"雾似吟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3601597448848995","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1772867278,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":34,"name":"番茄创作家","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/b5843b56036b58cdb9780e98954a620b~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/b5843b56036b58cdb9780e98954a620b~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7551370685692529688","book_info":{"abstract":"[单男主+无女主+无cp+群像+爽文+武侠]
碎碎念：男主很强很有钱，也很爱装，也非常注重仪式感。前期不想暴露身份，所以装作世家子弟。
主角团光环很大，实力都非常强，是新一代的佼佼者。
无CP线，因为作者不会写小情侣之间相处。
前两章基本上是男主的装装日常，心急的读者，可直接跳到第三章的主要剧情。
简介：初入江湖
随手搭救的少年，竟是个天赋异禀，自学成才的天才
随便招来的车夫，竟是江湖第一门掌门人的亲传弟子
就连死皮赖脸求收留的小无赖，好像都有着不为人知的身份
应潇笑了，他好像一不小心，把新一代的人才都收了
那便，去吧
去见识这期待已久的江湖
顺便
闯出一个新一代的，属于少年们的江湖
且看，这四位天之骄子
如何并肩携手，闯荡江湖！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oea32d73c958c08a55498346a2df5983f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"苍颓","author_id":"","book_id":"7551370685692529688","book_name":"少年人的江湖","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1364人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7551370771721896472","read_count":"1364","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"567415"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"280","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,武侠,无女主,扮猪吃虎,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oea32d73c958c08a55498346a2df5983f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318737&x-signature=i0CxNnuJqv74RF0ug7H7ABUbXuc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2352605986301272","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"206"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220712176526EE503EA447722025"}"},"relate_info_li
